hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes safer if every seeded backlog card must resolve to a matching seeded hypothesis-card artifact, so queued slices cannot drift before activation or resume from backlog-only state.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` enforced replayable hypothesis-card artifacts for active and resolved systems-optimizer cards only, so a backlog item in status `seeded` could still verify clean without `CLAW/control-plane/system-optimizer/hypotheses/<id>.json` or with drifted contract fields. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any seeded backlog item that lacks a matching seeded hypothesis card artifact or drifts from it across the bounded contract fields, while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if every seeded systems-optimizer backlog card must resolve to a matching seeded hypothesis-card artifact and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Seeded systems-optimizer backlog items need replayable hypothesis-card artifacts before activation; otherwise queued recovery work can drift before state.active_hypothesis is populated.
